summary: Build closure/phase diagnostics (“CK witness”) from NIST p-block ionization energies (periods 2–6) to produce reproducible state/lock and collapse-structure artifacts.
exit_criteria: v0 exit when: (1) the raw NIST extraction is auditable and reproducible, (2) the derived phase-diagram + state/lock + collapse/mixture artifacts are deterministic given (seed, nperm), (3) RESULTS.md fully specifies the diagnostic chain and model-selection conclusion, and (4) the repo is reduced to an essentials-only public footprint with a one-page REPRODUCIBILITY guide.
minimal_repair_layer: L4 (if inconsistencies appear, repair by revising preprocessing/feature definitions, clustering evaluation, or permutation tests before altering any lower-layer mechanism assumptions).
notes: This repo is a phenomenological diagnostic instrument: it quantifies regime-conditioned collapse structure and model-selection tradeoffs (k=3..5) across periods. Interpretive physics notes (e.g., relativistic effects) are explicitly treated as secondary hypotheses, not primary findings.
